hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git\s+(push\s+--force|push\s+-f|reset\s+--hard|clean\s+-f|checkout\s+\.\s*$|branch\s+-D)"; then echo "Blocked: destructive git command. Use safer alternatives or get explicit user approval." >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'file=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$"; then npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
